visa_types.name: Long term Training
visa_types.documents_required:
Long Term Checklist
Visa Application Documents (download): https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/index.html (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/index.html)

Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form.
Important Notes -
- All photocopies must be on A4-sized paper only.
- Submit your latest passport only. Old passports may be requested by the Embassy if required. Ensure any attached old passports are detached in advance.
- Provide two photocopies of the information (front) page of your current passport.
- All documents and old passports must be un-pinned and free from staples before submission.
- If any additional documents are required, you will be notified via phone/email/web remarks.
visa_types.processing_time:
It takes usually takes five (05) working days. Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In addition, there are some cases which may take longer processing period depending on the individual circumstances and interview case.
Please Note:
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Japan.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy of Japan, Bangladesh.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan for  Training for Long & Short Term.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan for  Training for Long & Short Term.

## Visa Fees And Service Charges
Please Note:
- For Bangladeshi Nationality – NO Visa Fees
- For Different Nationality – Visa Fees yet finalized from Embassy
- The details are as follows.
- Service/Courier Charge are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of BDT 2090 (inclusive of all taxes) levied per application.
- Service charge will be levied on applicants exempted from paying visa fees.
- All charges (Visa Fee, Service charges and other optional charges) are to be paid in cash only in BDT.
Optional Charges:
S.N. VAS PRICE in BDT
- Photograph (4 copies) 440
- Photocopy (per page) 11
- SMS service 262
- Form Filling Service 880
- Printing Service per page 66
- Courier  924
- Premium Lounge 3850

## Documents Required
Long Term Checklist
Visa Application Documents (download): https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/index.html (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/index.html)

Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form.
Important Notes -
- All photocopies must be on A4-sized paper only.
- Submit your latest passport only. Old passports may be requested by the Embassy if required. Ensure any attached old passports are detached in advance.
- Provide two photocopies of the information (front) page of your current passport.
- All documents and old passports must be un-pinned and free from staples before submission.
- If any additional documents are required, you will be notified via phone/email/web remarks.

## Photo Specifications
The photos should use 2 inch x 1.4 inch, taken within 6-months.

## Processing Time
It takes usually takes five (05) working days. Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In addition, there are some cases which may take longer processing period depending on the individual circumstances and interview case.
Please Note:
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Japan.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy of Japan, Bangladesh.

## Download Forms
 Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4SAlgMFUY508Y4ifWaXvNR/5f70595e801f86bb75b127d49f5f7bee/application-form.pdf)

Overview
This visa allows people for multiple entries over a fixed validity period offering greater travel flexibility.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa allows people for multiple entries over a fixed validity period offering greater travel flexibility.

## Visa Fees And Service Charges
Please Note:
- For Bangladeshi Nationality – NO Visa Fees
- For Different Nationality – Visa Fees yet finalized from Embassy
- The details are as follows.
- Service/Courier Charge are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of BDT 2090 (inclusive of all taxes) levied per application.
- Service charge will be levied on applicants exempted from paying visa fees.

- If any additional documents are required, you will be notified via phone/email/web remarks.

The photos should use 2 inch x 1.4 inch, taken within 6-months.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- This visa allows people to visit Japan for attending meetings/Conferences/seminars purposes up to 90 days.

## Visa Fees And Service Charges
Please Note:
- For Bangladeshi Nationality – NO Visa Fees
- For Different Nationality – Visa Fees yet finalized from Embassy
- The details are as follows.
- Service/Courier Charge are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of BDT 2090 (inclusive of all taxes) levied per application.
- Service charge will be levied on applicants exempted from paying visa fees.
- All charges (Visa Fee, Service charges and other optional charges) are to be paid in cash only in BDT.
Optional Charges:
S.N. VAS PRICE in BDT
- Photograph (4 copies) 440
- Photocopy (per page) 11
- SMS service 262
- Form Filling Service 880
- Printing Service per page 66
- Courier  924
- Premium Lounge 3850

## Documents Required
Short Term Checklist 
Visa Application Documents (download): https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/index.html (https://www.mofa.go.jp/j_info/visit/visa/index.html)
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form.
Important Notes -
- All photocopies must be on A4-sized paper only.
- Submit your latest passport only. Old passports may be requested by the Embassy if required. Ensure any attached old passports are detached in advance.
- Provide two photocopies of the information (front) page of your current passport.
- All documents and old passports must be un-pinned and free from staples before submission.
- If any additional documents are required, you will be notified via phone/email/web remarks.

## Photo Specifications
The photos should use 2 inch x 1.4 inch, taken within 6-months.

## Processing Time
It takes usually takes five (05) working days. Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In addition, there are some cases which may take longer processing period depending on the individual circumstances and interview case.
Please Note:
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Japan.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy of Japan, Bangladesh.

- All charges (Visa Fee, Service charges and other optional charges) are to be paid in cash only in BDT.
Optional Charges:
S.N. VAS PRICE in BDT
- Photograph (4 copies) 440
- Photocopy (per page) 11
- SMS service 262
- Form Filling Service 880
- Printing Service per page 66
- Courier  924
- Premium Lounge 3850

## Documents Required
 Dependent (Dependent, long term residence)  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4dBzL04lc07ALYl1Lbbwfh/beaccdfec69c75108f390aaab5f6eb43/Dependent-_Dependent-long-term-residence_.pdf)
Note: Kindly arrange the documents in the same order as outlined in Document Checklist and attach a copy of it along with your visa application form.
Important Notes -
- All photocopies must be on A4-sized paper only.
- Submit your latest passport only. Old passports may be requested by the Embassy if required. Ensure any attached old passports are detached in advance.
- Provide two photocopies of the information (front) page of your current passport.
- All documents and old passports must be un-pinned and free from staples before submission.
- If any additional documents are required, you will be notified via phone/email/web remarks.

## Photo Specifications
The photos should use 2 inch x 1.4 inch, taken within 6-months.

## Processing Time
It takes usually takes five (05) working days. Please make sure to apply in advance to avoid any inconvenience. In addition, there are some cases which may take longer processing period depending on the individual circumstances and interview case.
Please Note:
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Japan.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy of Japan, Bangladesh.

## Download Forms
 Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4SAlgMFUY508Y4ifWaXvNR/5f70595e801f86bb75b127d49f5f7bee/application-form.pdf)

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Overview
This visa allows people to visit Japan as a researcher and stay more than 90 days.

## Visa Fees And Service Charges
Please Note:
- For Bangladeshi Nationality – NO Visa Fees
- For Different Nationality – Visa Fees yet finalized from Embassy
- The details are as follows.
- Service/Courier Charge are inclusive of all taxes and non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of BDT 2090 (inclusive of all taxes) levied per application.
